caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a green baseball cap with headphones sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with clothing racks and mannequins in the background. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and is speaking and smiling. His dark green t-shirt features white text that reads "I've never SMUT AT WD". The background is decorated with several framed photographs on a white wall. In the lower corners of the scene, there are logos, one of which contains the text "BODILY". As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression shifts slightly, with his smile becoming more pronounced and his head tilting as he continues to engage in conversation. The camera remains static, maintaining a medium close-up shot of the man throughout the clip.
